epics.title: Learning Redesign
epics.description: Dashboard redesign, multi-curriculum support, smart daily practice plans, embedded video content, and per-skill coaching tips.

epics.title: Repo: Public Ready
epics.description: Clean up GitHub repo for public visibility: README, LICENSE, no AI signals, conventional commits, About section.

epics.title: Platform Reliability
epics.description: Migration deployment process, health checks, and frontend graceful degradation.

epics.title: Video Content Quality
epics.description: Fix invalid YouTube video IDs, add verification tooling, graceful UI fallbacks for unavailable videos, and process rules to prevent this recurring.

epics.title: Data Integrity
epics.description: Fix cross-curriculum data contamination, stale plans, missing FK constraints, and store sync gaps

epics.title: Roadmap Reborn
epics.description: Replace hardcoded curriculum data with live DB calls; add per-skill confidence, pace estimates, and phase preview drawer.

epics.title: Practice Hub
epics.description: Transform the Practice page into a daily-driver: week strip, today hero, one-tap quick-log, timer with pause/resume, grouped history.

epics.title: Mastery Map
epics.description: Give Skill Tree a distinct purpose: 4-state mastery nodes (not_started/learning/mastered/rusty), rusty detection, side panel with confidence sparkline.

epics.title: Analytics Deep
epics.description: 52-week heatmap, confidence trend chart, streak loss-aversion UI, and computed insight cards.

epics.title: Resources Redesign
epics.description: Phase-aware recommendations, card layout replacing accordion, completion tracking, and filter by type/phase.

epics.title: My Toolkit
epics.description: Personal tool curation: user_tools table, I-use-this toggle, My Toolkit hero section, phase-specific recommendations.

epics.title: Roadmap: Data Integrity
epics.description: Fix critical DB schema bugs before any UX work. Confidence rating column missing, skill_progress uses positional indices instead of skill_id FK (DI-003), missing constraints and indices.

epics.title: Roadmap: API Enrichment
epics.description: Make GET /api/roadmap return everything the v2 UI needs: phase titles, curriculum name, completion dates, real pace data, focus skill recommendation. Fix N+1 last_practiced_at query.

epics.title: Roadmap: Curriculum Seeding
epics.description: Fill sparse curricula. JustinGuitar (12 entries) and Marty Music (7 entries) are nearly empty. Full seeding with verified YouTube IDs, tips, exercises, descriptive phase titles.

epics.title: Roadmap: UX v2
epics.description: Full roadmap redesign: phase progress strip, curriculum chip, phase titles, completion dates, SkillDetailDrawer (video+tip+exercise+confidence), focus-on chip, pace estimator wired to real data.

epics.name: Retention Loop
epics.goal: Daily motivation flywheel: open → today's plan → practice → see progress → return

epics.name: Milestone Celebration
epics.goal: Phase completion as a meaningful event, not a silent checkbox

epics.name: Song–Skill Bridge
epics.goal: Songs tied to skill levels — completing a phase unlocks songs you can actually play

epics.name: Analytics V3
epics.goal: Confidence trends, BPM tracking, total hours — objective evidence of real improvement

epics.name: UX Breathing Room
epics.goal: Classy not noisy: whitespace system, mobile audit, typography, empty states, chip cleanup

epics.name: Intermediate Depth
epics.goal: Content for the 6–18 month player — the most abandoned cohort in every competing app

epics.name: Self Recording
epics.goal: Before/after skill recording — the most cited method for seeing real progress; no app does this

epics.name: Milestone Sharing
epics.goal: Shareable milestone cards, organic growth loop — social without leaderboards or competition

epics.name: PWA & Offline
epics.goal: Guitar practice happens everywhere — roadmap and today's plan must work without internet

epics.name: Zero Perceived Cold Start
epics.goal: Website always feels instant — multi-layer defense against Render free-tier cold starts
